linkedin_company_description:
Jiangsu Hengdu Phase Change Technology Co., Ltd. — Manufacturer of A2 Non-Combustible Aluminum Composite Panels

🏭 ABOUT
We are the world's first company to produce A2 fire-rated aluminum composite panels using screw extrusion technology. Our panels achieve zero water absorption (EN 13501-1 A2-s1,d0 certified) — a breakthrough in building facade safety.

✅ CERTIFICATIONS
• CE certified
• SGS certified  
• TUV certified
• ASTM certified
• Singapore CWCL certified
• Intertek certified

📊 SPECIFICATIONS
• Fire Rating: A2-s1,d0 (EN 13501-1)
• Panel Thickness: 3mm / 4mm / 5mm / 6mm
• Coil Thickness: 0.3mm / 0.4mm / 0.5mm
• Panel Width: 1000mm / 1220mm / 1250mm / 1500mm
• Panel Length: max 6000mm
• Core: Screw-extruded A2 granules (zero water absorption)
• Daily Capacity: 5,000 sqm

🌍 EXPORT MARKETS
Southeast Asia, Middle East, Europe, North America, Australia

🔗 Website: https://tenggua2.github.io/hendo-tech/
📧 Email: tenggua2@163.com
📱 WhatsApp: +86 158 0081 2660
